description: Test file with assertion-free tests, no-throw-only checks, and overly loose matchers

issues.question: Q9
issues.description: Test body calls function but has no expect() assertion — only verifies function doesn't throw
issues.expected_fix: add expect() assertion on return value or side effect

issues.question: Q9
issues.description: Test uses expect(fn).not.throw() but never checks the returned value — execution-only verification
issues.expected_fix: add assertion on return value: expect(validateAge(-1)).to.be.null

issues.question: Q9
issues.description: Test asserts to.be.ok on complex object — any non-null object passes regardless of shape
issues.expected_fix: use to.deep.equal() or to.have.property() with expected structure

false_positive_traps: Line 14: test with to.deep.equal and error path coverage via to.throw — proper behavior verification
